title: router.py: DodagState.preferred_parent is str but should be IPv6Address
description:
src/lichen/routing/router.py:285-291 converts preferred_parent from str to IPv6Address with try/except. The comment acknowledges this is awkward.

DodagState.preferred_parent is typed as str|None but actually stores an IPv6 address string. The 'flexibility' mentioned is illusory since it must always be a valid IPv6 address.

Fix: Change DodagState.preferred_parent to IPv6Address|None and update all call sites.
